text.p: I hope your programme is going on well. All praises to the Lord.
Please, find attached the departmental book proposal on the Ife Use of English Series.
Kindly work on your own part and let us have it in two weeks. The deadline for submission is January ending, but that cannot apply to you,since we are just sending this now.
Please, who did you hand over the review of English language programme to? we want to conclude work on it and process it further.
Thank you for invitating me to serve on the Editorial Advisory Board of the Handbook.
I accept your invitation and promise to bring my little academic and professional experience gained over the years to bear in this regard.
Thank again for the confidence reposed in me. I wish best of luck in the project.
